title: 前置詞の働きをするイディオム（群前置詞）
fullTitle: 第25章　前置詞の働きをするイディオム（群前置詞）

problems.question: The train was delayed 30 minutes (　　) a heavy rainfall.
problems.ja: その電車は大雨のため30分遅れた。
problems.en: The train was delayed 30 minutes because of a heavy rainfall.

problems.question: He failed the examination three times due (　　) his laziness.
problems.ja: 彼は自らの怠惰が原因で３回試験に落ちた。
problems.en: He failed the examination three times due to his laziness.

problems.question: The meeting was canceled (　　) the bad weather.
problems.ja: その会議は悪天候のため中止になった。
problems.en: The meeting was canceled owing to the bad weather.

problems.question: Farms are going bankrupt <u>on account of</u> the crisis in agriculture.
problems.ja: 農業危機のせいで，農場が破綻しようとしている。
problems.en: Farms are going bankrupt on account of the crisis in agriculture.

problems.question: (　　) her support, I was able to finish writing this report on time.
problems.ja: 彼女の援助のおかげで，私は予定通りにこの報告書を書き上げることができた。
problems.en: Thanks to her support, I was able to finish writing this report on time.

problems.question: (　　) its advantages, there are hardly any companies that are willing to try the new system.
problems.ja: その利点にもかかわらず，新しい方式を試してみようという企業はほとんどない。
problems.en: In spite of its advantages, there are hardly any companies that are willing to try the new system.

problems.question: (　　) all his faults, he is still a gentleman.
problems.ja: 欠点はあるが，それでも彼は紳士である。
problems.en: With all his faults, he is still a gentleman.

problems.question: <u>For all</u> his honesty, they say bad things about him.
problems.ja: 彼が誠実であるにもかかわらず，彼らは彼のことを悪く言う。
problems.en: For all his honesty, they say bad things about him.

problems.question: Anyone may join the tennis club (　　) how well they can play the game.
problems.ja: 試合でのプレーのうまさとは無関係に，だれでもそのテニスクラブに加入できる。
problems.en: Anyone may join the tennis club regardless of how well they can play the game.

problems.question: He went to Paris (　　) of studying music.
problems.ja: 彼は音楽を勉強する目的でパリに行った。
problems.en: He went to Paris for the purpose of studying music.

problems.question: We bought the (view / a / with / to / moving / cottage) there when we retire.
problems.rawAnswer: cottage with a view to moving
problems.ja: 私たちは定年後にそこに移り住む目的で，その小さな家を買った。
problems.answer: cottage with a view to moving
problems.en: We bought the cottage with a view to moving there when we retire.

problems.question: Mr. Suzuki gave up smoking for (　　) of his health.
problems.ja: スズキさんは健康のためにタバコを吸うのをやめた。
problems.en: Mr. Suzuki gave up smoking for the sake of his health.

problems.question: Water must be thought of (　　) terms of the chains of life it supports.
problems.ja: 水は，水が支えている生物の連鎖の点から考えられなければならない。
problems.en: Water must be thought of in terms of the chains of life it supports.

problems.question: <u>In relation to</u> this project, my opinion differs from yours.
problems.ja: この事業に関しては，私の意見はあなたと違う。
problems.en: In relation to this project, my opinion differs from yours.

problems.question: <u>As regards</u> that, I cannot agree with you.
problems.ja: そのことに関しては，私はあなたに賛同できません。
problems.en: As regards that, I cannot agree with you.

problems.question: Some people complained, but <u>as for</u> me, I'm perfectly satisfied.
problems.ja: 不満を漏らした人たちもいるが，私について言えば，完全に満足している。
problems.en: Some people complained, but as for me, I'm perfectly satisfied.

problems.question: Frank was very uncertain as (　　) whether it was the job for him.
problems.ja: フランクには，それが自分に合う仕事なのかどうか，まったく確信がなかった。
problems.en: Frank was very uncertain as to whether it was the job for him.

problems.question: Prof. Smith always divides people into six groups (　　) the tasks they can perform.
problems.ja: スミス教授は，人々がこなせる課題に応じて，常に彼らを６つのグループに分ける。
problems.en: Prof. Smith always divides people into six groups according to the tasks they can perform.

problems.question: (　　) to his expectations, Peter ran out of money halfway through his vacation.
problems.ja: ピーターの予想に反して，彼は休暇が半分過ぎたところでお金がなくなってしまった。
problems.en: Contrary to his expectations, Peter ran out of money halfway through his vacation.

problems.question: (　　) from their house in Los Angeles, they also have an apartment in New York.
problems.ja: ロサンゼルスの家の他に，彼らはニューヨークにもアパートを持っている。
problems.en: Apart from their house in Los Angeles, they also have an apartment in New York.

problems.question: He was deaf to everything (　　) than what he wanted to hear.
problems.ja: 彼は自分が聞きたいと思ったこと以外にはすべて耳を貸さなかった。
problems.en: He was deaf to everything other than what he wanted to hear.

problems.question: It's (　　) each of you to help make the project a success.
problems.ja: その事業の成功を手助けするのは君たちそれぞれの責任だ。
problems.en: It's up to each of you to help make the project a success.

problems.question: (　　) being a librarian, her brother works as a taxi driver.
problems.ja: 図書館員であることに加えて，彼女の兄［弟］はタクシーの運転手としても働いている。
problems.en: In addition to being a librarian, her brother works as a taxi driver.

problems.question: In (　　) with Spanish, English spelling is rather difficult.
problems.ja: スペイン語に比べれば，英語のつづり方はかなり難しい。
problems.en: In comparison with Spanish, English spelling is rather difficult.

problems.question: She won her position by (　　) of her hard work.
problems.ja: 彼女は必死に働いたおかげで自分の地位を勝ち取った。
problems.en: She won her position by virtue of her hard work.

problems.question: My friend is going to fly back to California (　　) Hawaii.
problems.ja: 私の友人はハワイ経由でカリフォルニアに飛行機で戻ってくるつもりだ。
problems.en: My friend is going to fly back to California by way of Hawaii.

problems.question: These are the ruins the professor was in search (　　).
problems.ja: これらはその教授が探していた遺跡だ。
problems.en: These are the ruins the professor was in search of.

problems.question: Next Tuesday, a concert will be held (　　) the tenth anniversary of the founding of our school.
problems.ja: 来週の火曜日，私たちの学校の設立10周年を記念してコンサートが催される。
problems.en: Next Tuesday, a concert will be held in honor of the tenth anniversary of the founding of our school.

problems.question: Most people in the room <u>were in favor of</u> the antismoking campaign.
problems.ja: その部屋にいたほとんどの人は，禁煙運動に賛成だった。
problems.en: Most people in the room were in favor of the antismoking campaign.

problems.question: John wore a sweater <u>instead of</u> a jacket.
problems.ja: ジョンはジャケットの代わりにセーターを着ていた。
problems.en: John wore a sweater instead of a jacket.

problems.question: I gave my old computer to a friend and said to her, "In (　　) of any trouble, you can always give me a ring."
problems.ja: 私は友人に自分の古いコンピューターをあげて，「何か問題が起きたら，いつでも私に電話をしてね」と彼女に言った。
problems.en: I gave my old computer to a friend and said to her, "In case of any trouble, you can always give me a ring."

problems.question: Mr. Tanaka is <u>in charge of</u> the new project.
problems.ja: 田中さんはその新しい事業の責任者だ。
problems.en: Mr. Tanaka is in charge of the new project.

problems.question: He made a speech (　　) the committee.
problems.ja: 彼は委員会を代表して演説をした。
problems.en: He made a speech on behalf of the committee.

problems.question: I'm willing to give you some money in (　　) for your labor.
problems.ja: 私はあなたの働きのお返しとして，いくらかお金をあげても構わないと思っています。
problems.en: I'm willing to give you some money in return for your labor.

problems.question:
(a) When I saw the Statue of Liberty, I was very impressed.
(b) I was very impressed at the (　　) of the Statue of Liberty.
problems.ja:
(a) 自由の女神を見たとき，私はとても感銘を受けた。
(b) 自由の女神を見て，私はとても感銘を受けた。
problems.en: I was very impressed at the sight of the Statue of Liberty.

problems.question:
書き出しにしたがって，空所に適語を入れなさい。
この地域の貧しい人々は完全に環境に左右されている。
The poor people in this area are completely at the (m　　) of their circumstances.
problems.ja:
書き出しにしたがって，空所に適語を入れなさい。
この地域の貧しい人々は完全に環境に左右されている。
problems.en: The poor people in this area are completely at the mercy of their circumstances.

problems.question: We want to increase our manufacturing output, but not (　　) the expense of the environment.
problems.ja: 私たちは工業生産高を増やしたいと思っているが，環境を犠牲にしてまでそうしたいとは思わない。
problems.en: We want to increase our manufacturing output, but not at the expense of the environment.

problems.question: The students were walking (　　) the direction of the sea.
problems.ja: 学生たちは海の方へ向かって歩いていた。
problems.en: The students were walking in the direction of the sea.

problems.question: (　　) of an emergency, please proceed calmly to the nearest exit.
problems.ja: 緊急の場合には落ち着いて最寄りの出口へと進んでください。
problems.en: In the event of an emergency, please proceed calmly to the nearest exit.
